title: The Key to Loki’s Chains
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Nami, Road, Unknown person #14 as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That's why...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: All the Warriors of Elbaf believe in...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ain't that the funniest thing ya ever heard?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Dereski shi shi!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's said that the third world refers to the present day. Meaning, it's a type of prophecy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mind you, legends of Nika have spread silently all over the world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only thing they all have in common is that he appears with a booming laugh to this beat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: DON DO TO TO >

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don Do To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To To I?

dialogue.text: Ah ha ha ha ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hehe, I'll read aloud then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: "-The first world..."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: "The Earth burned in endless flame..."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: "And the hearts of men..."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Earth burned in endless flame, and in the hearts of men burned with desire. From whispered prayers, the sun rose, beckoned by the enslaved who reached for the forbidden star. The god of the land was enraged. With a serpent of fire, they cast the world into ruin. Darkness fell. Death re

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A breath stirred in the Abys. The god of the forest wore their magic; nurturing its devils, while the sun lit the embers of war. Those of the half-crescent and full moons dreamed. The ones who slew the sun defined themselves evoking the wrath of the sea god. They would not

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world drifts in a void. Yet time does not erase the memory of the promised day. Its shadow looms as the voice of the half moon echoes through the ages; and once more, the sun GOD shall rise- laughing; dancing; guiding the world to its final act.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A deep mythology unveiled!!

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 22 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
